title: Ophryosporus mandonii

It is native to the Andes mountains in South America, specifically in Chile and Argentina. This plant is also known as 'Mountain Harebell' or 'Ceratiola'. The exact classification within the family Boraginaceae is not explicitly clear, but it is a member of the order Lamiales. Further taxonomic analysis may be necessary to determine the exact classification of Ophryosporus mandonii within the family.
